project_type: C++ header-only AI assistant (single compilation unit)
build_system: make - single compilation unit that #includes all .cpp files through system/mk_entry.cpp
verification_instructions:
1. Run 'make' to confirm compilation. 2. Run interactive test: printf 'hello
what is 5 times 3
what is 10 divided by 2
/quit
' | ./mk_os 2>&1 | sed 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m//g' | grep -E '^  [~]'
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET. clang++ with C++17, libcurl, libsqlite3 available.
contribution_requirements: Commit directly to main and push.
key_patterns: All .cpp files are header-only (guarded with #ifndef). mk_entry.cpp includes all other files. Classes use methods not free functions. No separate .h files.
directory_structure: MK_OS/ is the project root with Makefile. system/mk_entry.cpp is the single compilation unit entry point. ai_core/ has math_solver, smart_router, conversation_mode. llm/ has thinking_engine, provider_router. mk_brain/personality/ has response_style.
